title: Login Issue
description: User unable to log into the system after multiple attempts.

title: Page not loading
description: The dashboard page is not loading properly, stuck on a blank screen.

title: Payment Processing Error
description: The payment gateway throws an error when trying to make a payment.

title: Password Reset Request
description: User requests a password reset link but does not receive it.

title: System Crash
description: Application crashes unexpectedly when saving data.

title: Incorrect Data Displayed
description: The user profile shows incorrect contact information.

title: Email Notifications Not Sending
description: Users are not receiving any notification emails when a task is assigned.

title: API Timeout Error
description: API call times out after 30 seconds of waiting.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Customer requests the addition of a dark mode feature to the interface.

title: Slow Performance
description: The app takes too long to load, especially on mobile.

title: Database Connection Failure
description: The app is unable to connect to the database, resulting in failed operations.

title: User Account Locked
description: User account was locked after multiple failed login attempts.

title: App Notifications Bug
description: Push notifications are not being delivered to users even though they are enabled.

title: File Upload Error
description: Users cannot upload files over 10MB due to a server-side error.

title: Internal Server Error
description: 500 internal server error when trying to access the settings page.
